perks.summary: convert a crystal structure file between formats (CIF, POSCAR, XYZ, JSON, ...) via pymatgen (read-only, file producer)
analyze a crystal structure — composition, lattice, symmetry/space group, coordination — and export JSON (read-only)
build a Materials Project phase diagram for a chemical system and assess stability (read-only; needs mp-api + MP_API_KEY + network)
